violations.text: The hand-washing sink in the kitchen was blocked by containers of deli meat and the plastic packaging in the sink basin. A hand-washing sink shall be accessible at all times for employee use. Food items and packaging were moved during the time of inspection. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 09/08/2025
The walk-in cooler was not able to effectively have the door remain closed. Equipment must be properly adjusted and be in good repair. New Violation. Correct By: 10/08/2025

Meatballs were observed held at 92 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. Per interview, PIC stated that the product had been in hot hold unit for less than 2 hours. PIC reheated meatballs and achieved an internal temperature of 170 degrees Fahrenheit. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/26/2024

The door to the outside, located in the back hallway, is not tight-fitting. Outer openings of a food establishment must be protected against the entry of insects and rodents by tight-fitting doors. New Violation. Correct By: 09/26/2024
